overall.description: A first-person perspective sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a foggy night drive along a coastal highway. The player drives past a gas station and other vehicles before leaving the road to explore a grassy coastal area with palm trees and distant city lights visible through the heavy fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy coastal highway with gas station

events.description: oncoming vehicle with bright headlights passes on the left side of the road
black vehicle overtakes on the right side and moves ahead
vehicle steers sharply left off the paved highway onto grassy terrain

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the foggy coastal highway, navigating past other vehicles while approaching a gas station on the right

notable_agents.action: oncoming car traveling in the opposite direction passes by at 4 seconds
black car overtakes the ego vehicle on the right at 8 seconds

entered.detail: modern commercial building with illuminated signage and canopy lights visible through fog
metal safety railing running along the left edge of the road overlooking the coast
tall pole with bright orange sodium vapor light cutting through the fog
commercial billboards and building lights glowing in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy coastal highway at night, driving past a gas station on the right. The road is illuminated by streetlights cutting through the heavy fog. Several vehicles pass by - one oncoming in the opposite lane and another overtaking on the right. The camera maintains a steady driving pace along the asphalt road bordered by a guardrail on the left.

events.description: transitions from paved highway to off-road grassy terrain, leaving the road behind
palm trees become visible through the fog as the camera approaches the coastline

agents.ego_description: moving through tall coastal grass and vegetation toward the foggy shoreline, exploring the area near palm trees

entered.detail: tall wild grass and bushes covering the ground off the highway
silhouetted palm trees visible through the fog marking the coastline
orange and white lights from distant urban structures piercing through the fog
dark horizontal line of the sea visible beyond the grassy dunes

segments.scene_description: Leaving the highway, the scene shifts to a foggy coastal grassland. The camera moves through dense tall grass and bushes toward the shoreline, where palm trees stand silhouetted against the fog. Distant city lights glow orange through the mist on the left, while the dark ocean horizon becomes visible ahead. The environment is devoid of other vehicles or people, creating an isolated, atmospheric exploration of the foggy coast.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous movement from a bustling, neon-lit highway into the isolated silence of a foggy coastal wilderness. It begins with a steady drive along a dark asphalt road, passing a gas station and weaving through traffic as streetlights pierce through the heavy night mist. As the camera leaves the highway, the scene shifts from the structured road and guardrails into a dense expanse of tall grass and coastal bushes. The environment then opens up toward the shoreline, where silhouetted palm trees emerge from the fog and distant orange city lights glow faintly to the left. Finally, the movement leads toward the dark horizon of the ocean, completing the transition from an urban transit corridor to a lonely, atmospheric landscape.
